docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $628.00 FILED BY SPECIALIZED LEGAL SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARDO, LANCE R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-13-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GALLARDO, LANCE R.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECIALIZED LEGAL SERVICES, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY SPECIALIZED LEGAL SERVICES, INC. GALLARDO, LANCE R.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2009 BY PRO TEM.JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECIALIZED LEGAL SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLARDO, LANCE R. $133.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $258.00, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DOES OWE PLAINTIFF MONIES FOR SERVICES; HOWEVER DEFENDANT IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE $450.00 IN FILING FEES SINCE THEY WERE NOT AUTHORIZED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
